independence_definition: A unique (tenant_id, actor_id) pair. The originating source is admission, not corroboration. The same actor corroborating a claim twice counts once.
promotion_rule: Confidence advances through independent corroboration only. Same-source or same-tenant repetition does not promote. Structural elevation requires human operator action — never automated.

levels.condition: Extracted from one originating source. No independent corroboration yet.
One credible independent source beyond the origin.
Two independent corroborating sources beyond the origin.
Three or more independent corroborating sources beyond the origin.
Active unresolved contradiction. Score frozen. Promotion blocked.
